_rationale: FIX-D byte-equivalence descriptor. All three prerequisites landed: (1) stub dedup (FIX-D.1) — registered_tools_ count matches Go's 14; (2) Option B custom emit-order (FIX-D.2) — tools/list envelope built with nlohmann::ordered_json matching Go jsonschema-go field ordering; (3) tool DESCRIPTION TEXT sync (FIX-D.3) — all 14 tool registrations in src/mcp/handlers_{core,explore,index,analysis,context}.cpp now carry Go-equivalent description text including emoji prefixes, expanded help, valid-value enumerations, and per-property descriptions. context.refs items schema extended via ToolProperty::items_schema_override to express the nested-object ref struct (f/l/note/role/s/x with sub-properties) for parity. index_stats gained the missing include_watch_mode property.

tiers._rationale_stable: result.tools is byte-stable post FIX-D.3 text sync. Canonicalization (alphabetical key sort) ensures Go and C++ outputs match field-by-field including the nested context.refs items schema. The centralized JSON-RPC envelope ignore baseline masks id/jsonrpc/result.meta.*.
